reasoning: Denial-of-service (DoS) protection in Kubernetes can be addressed through multiple layers. NetworkPolicies can be used to restrict ingress traffic by default, which is a fundamental step in mitigating DoS attacks. Rate limiting can be implemented at the network level or through service mesh configurations to control traffic flow and prevent overload. The API server can be configured with specific flags or settings to protect against DoS attacks, such as limiting the number of requests per second. Additionally, service meshes like Istio can provide advanced traffic management and control, which can help in mitigating DoS attacks.
title: Denial-of-service Protection
